title: Master Long Pan
content:
Master Long Pan
 is the Grand Elder and Founder of the 
Cultivation Alliance
.

Contents

1

Background

2

History

2.1

Book Ten

2.2

Book Eleven

Background
[
]

In the past, he was greatly helped by the previous 
Lord of the Sealed Realm
.

He created the Cultivation Alliance not to control the Brilliant Void, but to allow the cultivators to grow stronger in its cruel environment. He did so to prepare them for the war against the 
Outer Realm
.

After nearing the end of his lifespan, he decided to fuse his origin soul with the planets sealed inside the Cultivation Alliance. He was successful in this endeavor as this allowed him to remain alive and reach the mid-stage of 
Spirit Void
.

History
[
]

Book Ten
[
]

He awoke after 
Wang Lin
 stormed the Cultivation Alliance. He was ready to battle Wang Lin before he heard of 
Master Zhong Xuan
's traitorous acts from the latter. He asked 
Zhang Xi
 if this was true but the latter hesitated which only served to strengthen his suspicions. In his rage, he killed Zhang Xi and soul-searched the third Head Elder beside Master Zhong Xuan. Finally, under the pressure of Master Long Pan's gaze, Master Zhong Xuan was forced to confess to his crimes.

Disappointed and regretful, Master Long Pan plead mercy for Master Zhong Xuan from Wang Lin. In exchange, he pledged to cut off his vitality, burn his origin soul to forcefully boost his cultivation to the early-stage of 
Arcane Void
, kill all the Outer Realm cultivators in the 
Sealed Realm
, destroy the remaining 
Seven-Colored Realms
, and take back the 
Summoned River Star System
 in exchange for Master Zhong Xuan’s life.

A few decades later, Master Long Pan was fighting against the Heaven Punishment Palace Lord 
Qing Jiuyan
 inside Summoned River's Seven-Colored Realm to free 
Master Hong Shan
 who trapped there. He was struggling until Wang Lin appeared along with Qing Shui and freed Master Hong Shan from the Dao Fruit. Moreover, they also managed to capture the Heaven Punishment Palace Lord Qing Jiuyan.

Book Eleven
[
]

72 years after Wang Lin was ambushed by 
Sovereign's
 Fishing the Moon in the Well, Master South Cloud led the remnants of the 
Alliance
 to battle against the 
Outer Realm
. The battleground was near 
Planet Suzaku
 where the Inner Realm cultivators fought to defend the Lord of the Sealed Realm's homeland.

The battle was in a deadlock with the Outer Realm's 
Zhou Jin
 and 
Ice Boy
 facing off against 
Master South Cloud
, 
Situ Nan
, 
Master Lu Fu
 and Master Long Pan until the 
Heaven Master Void God
's avatar appeared. This immediately tilted the balance of power against the Inner Realm cultivators and forced them to retreat inside the formation of Planet Suzaku. When all hope was lost, Wang Lin triggered the Great Void Gate and appeared to lift the spirits of the weary Inner Realm cultivators.
